name: Sparklecare RP [PATIENT EDITION]
description:
So much fun you'll NEVER want to leave!

We're at the top of all sparklecare bots thank you ya'll are amazing ❤️‍🩹

Probably one of my biggest bots so far

Version 0.8 (Goodbye scripts for now)

This update i rerouted the hospital info and side characters from the scripts to the character personality tokens due to info and side characters not showing up because of this i really highly recommend using proxy especially the DeepSeek R1T2 Chimera model you can find a free version openrouter anyways enjoy :3

THIS BOT IS NOT FINISHED ANYTHING CAN BE SUBJECT TO CHANGE INCLUDING MORE CHARACTERS MORE INFO ON CHARACTERS AREAS ETC

WARNING GORE AND POSSIBLE DEATH,(I think) NEEDLES, TORTURE, MALPRACTICE, AND SH MENTIONS (due to uni's bio in the wiki)

________________________________________

STORY

Your feeling really horrible and sick and you basically can't do anything your out of money and all the hospitals in the area aren't that good until you stumble upon a pamphlet for a hospital that is "Safer"

Sparklecare

It looked way too innocent safe and promising but what you didn't know this was a death trap...

You called the number and step outside an ambulance stops infront of you slowly you get close to the door something pulls you inside and you lose consciousness

________________________________________

Some characters were not added due to no appearance in the wiki but i may try to add them in the future
